J,o in ipairs({{-710911-(-710912);633006+-632638},{518427-518426,875906-875883};{-797211+797235,63671-63303}})do while o[-640614-(-640615)]<o[1001422-1001420]do local function J(J)return C[J-(733638+-701070)]end do local return(A(4215928-386331,{}))(v(b))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[J(666745+-633878)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
